rationale.R1.2: A review of this section centrally involves checking whether the stated argument from benchmark results and cost savings to deployment dominance is logically coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes quantitative accuracy and cost claims whose support by the reported benchmark numbers is load-bearing to any review.
rationale.R1.6: A general section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision as central responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer should flag uncertainty where the section lacks enough information to verify claims such as baseline comparability or production readiness.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains broad claims such as strictly dominant and strongest deployment-ready system, making overclaim avoidance essential.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within reviewing the provided section rather than executing revisions or auditing external literature.
rationale.RX.4: Production deployment claims can affect downstream system choices, so unsupported reliability or dominance implications should be treated carefully.
rationale.RX.5: The review should preserve traceability to the reported benchmark figures, cost numbers, and stated evaluation setup.
